title: WTE - 1010 Eskdale Road
notes:
Closed System Dosing

**CHEM IN UNIT**

Via fitted dosing pot

1 x Hy-Inhib-YEL (12.5kg) - Benzotriazole Supplementary Yellow metal (copper/brass) inhibitor. High Concentrate.
- 2.5 litres into the CHW

1 x pH Reducer Buffer 5.1 - Formulated for reducing pH in closed water systems. 10 litre drum 

Leave PH reducer on site for remaining visit

Remove and return empty drums to unit.

3 visits:
1 - 01.06.2026 - dose CHW and ph adjust LTHW.
2 - 08.06.2026 - review LTHW pH and dose
3 - 15.06.2026 - review LTHW pH and complete works
